calendar.matters:
MOTION FOR ATTORNEY FEES AND EXPENSES
Off Calendar Sep-24-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK N.A.'s MOTION FOR ATTORNEY FEES AND EXPENSES:

Based on the Jordan declaration and the contract between the parties attached to the complaint, Plaintiff Wells Fargo Bank, N.A.'s motion for attorney fees and expenses is granted in the amount of $925.00.

order signed.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: S. Le, Not Reported. =(302/EPS)

MOTION FOR ATTORNEY FEES AND EXPENSES
Off Calendar Sep-17-2020 Continued To Sep-24-20 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Atty. TRISTAN ESPINOSA, Esq. of Reese Law Group (Tel: 760-842-5850 ext. 236) for plaintiff;
No other appearances made in this matter.

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK N.A.'S MOTION FOR ATTORNEY FEES AND EXPENSES.

Argument presented by plaintiff's counsel. The Court continues this matter to September 24, 2020 at 9:30 a.m. for further hearing. Plaintiff's counsel may submit a supplemental declaration by September 22, 2020 to provide a factual basis for an award of attorney's fees.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Sean Kane; Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR No. 8600, email: maria.torreano@gmail.com. (302/EPS)
